auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ChatPDF API key sent in the x-api-key header. View your key in the ChatPDF backend API documentation after signing in: https://www.chatpdf.com/docs/api/backend.

actions.name: add_source_url
actions.description: Import a publicly reachable PDF URL into ChatPDF and return its source ID.

url.description: The publicly reachable URL of the PDF to import.

inputSchema.description: The PDF URL to import into ChatPDF.

sourceId.description: The source ID assigned to the imported PDF.

outputSchema.description: The ChatPDF source created from the URL.

actions.name: chat
actions.description: Ask ChatPDF one or more stateless questions about an imported PDF source.

sourceId.description: The ChatPDF source ID for the imported PDF.

role.description: The author role for this message.

content.description: The message text sent to ChatPDF.

items.description: One message in the stateless ChatPDF conversation.

messages.description: The stateless conversation sent to ChatPDF.

referenceSources.description: Whether ChatPDF should include inline page citations and reference metadata.

inputSchema.description: The source and conversation messages to send to ChatPDF.

content.description: The answer text generated from the PDF.

pageNumber.description: The one-based PDF page number used in the answer.

items.description: One PDF page referenced by ChatPDF.

references.description: The PDF pages cited in the answer.

actions.name: delete_sources
actions.description: Delete one or more imported PDF sources from ChatPDF.

inputSchema.description: The ChatPDF source IDs to delete.

deletedSources.description: The source IDs accepted for deletion.

outputSchema.description: The source IDs accepted for deletion by ChatPDF.
